subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the verses and revealed the clear proofs, and caused all things to proclaim that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نزل الایات و اظهر البینات و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
